ogTitle: Shallow Bay vs Shalvey: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Shallow Bay and Shalvey.
heading: Shallow Bay vs Shalvey — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Shallow Bay, New South Wales and Shalvey, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Shallow Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Shalvey (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Shallow Bay or Shalvey safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Shallow Bay has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Shalvey scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Shallow Bay scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Shalvey scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Shallow Bay or Shalvey?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Shallow Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
